purpose: Define export manifest and provenance requirements so future restores can verify artifact origin, contents, capability set, and recovery expectations.
problems_addressed: ZIP existed but sidecar SHA manifest was missing.
Stable release ZIP was valid but older than the current working state.
Restores lacked internal provenance when sidecar files were lost.
Exports did not consistently declare included capability sets or restore policy.
provenance_requirements: materials: pointer, ledger, DAG, boot manifest, artifact registry
sidecar_policy: Sidecar SHA manifest must be written next to the ZIP.
The ZIP must also contain internal manifest/provenance so restore remains explainable if sidecar is lost.
If sidecar is missing, restore may only continue through explicit manifest-repair stage.
restore_contract_requirements: restore must verify SHA manifest or explicit manifest-repair receipt
restore must normalize git core.filemode=false before status checks
restore must verify required capabilities before promotion
restore must not overwrite active root until staging validation passes
non_goals: F4 does not export a ZIP.
F4 does not run boot recovery.
F4 does not implement the restore ladder.
